zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，等待突破]
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格在2278.25附近，维持横盘整理的状态。尽管24小时变化仅为0.14%，但价格波动的幅度较小，表明市场暂时缺乏明确方向。短期内，市场可能处于等待消息或重要事件的阶段，短期内可能仍会在此区间内震荡。

从技术指标来看，MACD处于负值区间，表明卖盘压力依然存在，但由于缺乏明确的信号线数据，短期内趋势尚不明确。SMA(20)处于2339.23，显示出价格仍在低于短期均线水平，暗示下行压力较大。RSI值暂时无法提供参考，但考虑到MACD和SMA的信号，市场情绪偏向谨慎。

支撑位在2270.7附近，若价格跌破该点位，可能会进一步测试2240附近的支撑。阻力位则在2278.58附近，突破该价格可能会带来更大的上涨空间，尤其是接近2300的关键技术区间。

基于当前的市场结构，建议投资者保持观望，等待价格突破2278.58或2270.7的关键技术水平。突破后可以考虑顺势操作，若继续震荡，则建议以区间交易为主，控制风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
The Ethereum price against the US Dollar (ETH/USD) is currently trading at $2278.25, showing minimal change in the last 24 hours. Despite the slight uptick, ETH remains in a consolidative phase. The recent price action is tightly bound between the daily high of $2278.58 and the low of $2270.7. The price is still below the 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) at $2339.23, indicating a bearish bias in the short term. A potential shift may occur if ETH breaks above the SMA, signaling the possibility of a trend reversal.

Looking at the MACD, the current value of -14.47321 shows bearish momentum, though there is no available signal line for confirmation. A negative MACD suggests continued downward pressure, but without a signal line, the outlook remains uncertain. The absence of the RSI makes it challenging to assess overbought or oversold conditions at this point. Still, traders should monitor these indicators closely for any signs of divergence or reversal as price action evolves. 

In terms of support and resistance, ETH/USD is currently testing key support around $2270, with further downside potential toward the $2250 level if bearish momentum persists. On the upside, resistance is located at the SMA level of $2339.23. A breakout above this level could pave the way for a rally toward $2400. Short-term traders should consider taking positions near the support zone for potential upside, while a move below $2270 could trigger further declines.

For the coming sessions, ETH/USD could continue to range within its current levels, but a break above the 20-period SMA or below the support zone could dictate the next direction. Conservative traders should wait for confirmation from the MACD or a breakout in either direction before committing to a trade.
